jsonLd.title: LIC is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, LIC in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
